title: "TRSE units: CHIP8"

# CHIP8

These paths are relative to `units/CHIP8/` in the TRSE tree. Reference a unit with `@use "<path>"` (no `.tru` extension).

## Files

- `system/schip`
- `system/system`
- `system/xo_chip`
